title: Durga Kali Tanjung Priok Jakarta.jpg
description: The statue of the Hindu goddess Kali or Durga from Tanjung Priok, North coast of Jakarta, Indonesia. This granite statue was found in the eastern part of Tanjung Priok in 1883. Measured a height 65 cm in crossed-leg sitting position with four arms. Probably related to Hindu sage (Rsi) community in the area. Possibly originated from 7th-8th century CE. Jakarta History Museum.
